title: The Bantu Creation: How Death Came to the World
description: God sends the chameleon with a message of eternal life, but the lizard outruns it with a message of death.
introduction: God sends the chameleon with a message of eternal life, but the lizard outruns it with a message of death.

translation.text: God said to the chameleon: 'Go tell the people they will not die.' But the lizard ran faster.
